findings.title: Nil pointer dereference in Aggregator.Sum
findings.description: store.Get returns nil for nonexistent metric name, then m.Value is accessed without nil check

findings.title: Nil function pointer dereference in Dashboard.Render
findings.description: Map lookup returns nil function for nonexistent widget name, then fn() is called without nil check

findings.title: Nil pointer dereference in ingestData via parseMetricLine
findings.description: parseMetricLine returns nil on malformed input, then m.Name and other fields are accessed without nil check

findings.title: Nil pointer dereference in compareMetrics
findings.description: User-supplied metric names passed to store.Get which returns nil, both m1 and m2 dereferenced without checks

findings.title: Nil pointer dereference in Aggregator.Max
findings.description: Nil check on best variable masks missing nil check on m, m.Value accessed when m is nil and best is non-nil
